sections.paragraph:
Original: טמן

Transliteration: ṭâman

Phonetic: taw-man'

BDB Definition:

  1. to hide, conceal, bury
    1. (Qal)
      1. to hide
      2. hiding, concealing, secretly laying (participle)
      3. darkness (participle)
    2. (Niphal) to hide oneself
    3. (Hiphil) to hide

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 811

Part(s) of speech: Verb
